message:
Add ToolResult type for screenshot image delivery to LLM providers

The agent previously only received "Screenshot saved to ..." text but
never saw the actual image. This introduces a ToolResult type carrying
optional base64 image data, updates all adapters and the agent loop to
use it, and teaches the Anthropic client to embed images as native
content blocks in tool_result messages. OpenAI gracefully degrades to
text-only since its tool messages don't support images.

Also adds return_screenshot parameter to web adapter action tools
(click, type, press, navigate, eval, wait_for) so the agent can
request a screenshot after any action in a single tool call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
